MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-04-2012 IN 206, PLAINTIFF DANA ZIPSER'S MOTION TO RESTORE ACTION TO MASTER CAL TRIAL CALENDAR IS GRANTED. THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON 1/15/13 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 610 IS VACATED AND A JURY TRIAL IS SET FOR 6/10/13 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. THE NEW TRIAL DATE WILL BE DEEMED TO BE THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE FOR STATUTORY CUT-OFF PURPOSES. THE MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER BY CLOSE OF BUSINESS ON 12/5/12. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, ADVANCED FROM JUN-04-2013 TO MAY-29-2013 1:00 PM IN DEPT. 212 WITH CONFERENCE OFFICER NANCY HUDGINS.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-20-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZIPSER, DANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KISBY, JOHN D IT IS THE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT THAT PLAINTIFF DANA ZIPSER SHALL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHN D. KISBEY THE SUM OF THREE THOUSAND DOLLARS. ($3,000.00) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
